title: Stage 04b Security Review Gate
description: Stage 4b (Security Review) gate. Conditional — only written when stage-04a reports security_review_required: true. Authored by the security role; veto: true halts the pipeline regardless of any other gate.

security_approved.description: Security reviewer's overall verdict. True only when no high/critical issues remain unresolved.

veto.description: Hard halt. When true, the pipeline cannot advance regardless of peer-review approvals or any subsequent stage. Reserved for unfixable security defects.

triggering_conditions.description: Which security-trigger heuristics fired (e.g. 'path:auth', 'dep:upgrade', 'crypto:new-primitive'). Captured for audit so the same conditions raise the same review next time.
